title: bolboschoenus maritimus subsp. maritimus
intro: Bolboschoenus maritimus subsp. maritimus, also known as sea club-rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat respiratory issues. The plant's roots and rhizomes have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and coughs, as well as to lower fever and soothe digestive issues. In addition to its medicinal properties, Bolboschoenus maritimus subsp. maritimus has been shown to have antibacterial and antifungal properties, which can help to promote overall health and well-being.
